positive: A symmetrical, minimalist celestial jungle scene. Depict bioluminescent exotic flora (large, stylized leaves and flowering vines) intertwined with abstract constellations and crescent moons. The style should be a sophisticated blend of Art Nouveau and scientific illustration, rendered with deep indigo, vibrant teal, and glowing gold accents. Use strong, clean silhouettes and high contrast for maximum visibility when printed on fabric. The composition must be centralized and scalable, focusing on repeating, elegant patterns that evoke a sense of cosmic mystery and natural wonder. Highly detailed, vector-like precision, volumetric lighting, flat graphic design aesthetic.
